title: tangy dense croatian bread fritters
description: quick-fix croatian dish featuring white bread mix, air-fried for a crispy exterior and soft interior. a tangy and satisfying snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine white bread mix, water, eggs, onion, garlic, dill, salt, black pepper, and baking powder. Mix everything together until a thick batter forms.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let it rest for 10 minutes to allow the bread mix to absorb the liquid.
Using a spoon or small ice cream scoop, drop small balls of the batter into the air fryer basket, leaving about 1 inch of space between each fritter.
Cook the fritters for 5-7 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until they are golden brown and crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
Repeat with the remaining batter, cooking in batches if necessary.
Serve the fritters hot, sprinkled with additional chopped dill if desired.
